messages.subject: [R-jobs] Experienced R Programmers Wanted
messages.body_plain:
REvolution Computing is a growing and well-funded startup with offices
in Seattle and New Haven. We are looking for highly qualified and
experienced R programmers for both short term consulting projects and
for long term positions. Knowledge of statistics, R graphics and C/C++
are all highly desirable. Candidates should have a strong
understanding and appreciation of good software development processes.
Candidates located in Seattle are preferred.

Send a CV to lee at revolution-computing.com.

-- 
Lee E. Edlefsen, Ph.D.
Vice President of Engineering
REvolution Computing, Inc.
1100 Dexter Avenue N, Suite 205
Seattle, WA  98109
